body:
# 8 Blue Bedroom Picks for a Restful Retreat ![8 Blue Bedroom Picks for a Restful Retreat](/images/bedroom-blue-retreat-hero.jpg) Blue is one of the most enduring and versatile bedroom palettes for good reason — it slows the mind, lowers visual temperature, and creates the kind of room you genuinely want to come home to. The version of blue that is having its moment right now sits in that considered middle ground: not the sharp pop of cobalt, not the coldness of steel. Think soft powder, aged sky, misty morning — blue that reads as calm rather than cold, and that layers beautifully with natural textures like linen, stone, rattan, and wood. Whether you are working with a rental bedroom or designing from scratch, these 8 picks build that room systematically: anchor pieces with weight, soft goods that add warmth, lighting that flatters, and a few detail moments that make it feel curated. Each one is chosen for how it plays with the others — this is a palette, not just a list. --- 1. [Block Mini Floral Jade Marble Table Lamp (CB2)](https://www.cb2.com/block-mini-floral-jade-marble-table-lamp/s435203?utm_source=Pinterest&utm_medium=paid-social&utm_campaign=FY26_US_Core_ACQ_Conversion_Sales_Performance%2BShopping_040725&adid=4260609189708#universal_link) 2. [Velvet Scallop Edge Reversible Quilt (Pottery Barn)](https://www.potterybarn.com/products/velvet-scallop-edge-reversible-quilt/?catalogId=84&sku=8159003&cm_ven=PLA&cm_cat=Google&cm_pla=Bedding%20%3E%20Quilts%20%26%20Coverlets&cm_ite=8159003_14552546110_pla-545093785891&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=14552546110&gbraid=0AAAAADr1rYV6KMLvGrCGyeyF-iPEXGxX6&gclid=CjwKCAjwhe3OBhABEiwA6392zMOoYAvcTw6S2SaItwo0LlEfOW14gfGtfK0-iKDUQ3pxnMNqueCPdBoC6jgQAvD_BwE) 3. [Bubbles Ivory Oval Wall Mirror (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/Bubbles-Ivory-Oval-Wall-Mirror/dp/B0BH6X3QX6/ref=asc_df_B0BH6X3QX6?tag=ushpadpinsp-20) 4. [Gracie Oaks 23" Fluted Nightstand (Wayfair)](https://www.wayfair.com/furniture/pdp/gracie-oaks-23-fluted-nightstand-with-mid-century-modern-w116481496.html?piid=605077749) 5. [Curva Marble Taper Candle Holder (CB2)](https://www.cb2.com/curva-marble-taper-candle-holder/s420817?utm_source=Pinterest&utm_medium=paid-social&utm_campaign=FY26_US_Core_ACQ_Conversion_Sales_Performance%2BShopping_040725&adid=4260609189708#universal_link) 6. [Coral Parsons Wall Art (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/s?k=coral+parsons+wall+art&tag=ushpadpinsp-20) 7. [COSIEST Hand-Painted Antique Ottoman (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/s?k=COSIEST+hand+painted+antique+ottoman&tag=ushpadpinsp-20) 8. [Romilly Pleated Curtain Panel by Eastern Accents (Perigold)](https://www.perigold.com/decor/pdp/eastern-accents-romilly-pleated-curtain-panel-p110218499.html?piid=1755993211) --- [Browse bedroom layout plans on Etsy →](https://www.etsy.com/shop/athomeplans) ---
